summary: Stealth-Keyword Local Seeder (companion to Auto-Promote): 20/20 unit tests + 5/5 live-API smoke tests PASS. Frontend conditional UI verified by code inspection — full Playwright flow blocked by GSC-not-connected on preview env (the ap-block + nested local-block only render once GSC is connected; same constraint applied in iter167-169).
critical_code_review_comments: stealth_seo_local_seed.py find_matching_city_page line 117: condition `t in qtoks or t in _tokens(query)` — the second clause is broader (no len-3/stopword filter). For multi-word towns containing short words (e.g. 'St Albans' → 'st' is len 2 + stopword-ish), this lets the multi-word match fall through. Logic is intentional but worth a brief code comment so future maintainers don't 'simplify' it.

stealth_seo_local_seed.apply_local_seed line 222: `merged_capped = merged[:25]` keeps the OLDEST 25 keywords; once the cap is hit new seeds are silently dropped. Consider reversing to keep newest, or at least logging when a seed is dropped due to cap.

Pre-existing (carried from iter169): stealth_seo_auto_promote.py line 181 has reachable `return rows[0] if rows else None` — fine, but file-level docstring still references old single-promotion behavior; update for batch-mode + scope dispatch.

Public route /api/shop/city-page/{slug} naturally surfaces hidden_seo_keywords because Mongo find_one returns the field when set (no projection excluding it). Acceptable, but a deliberate explicit projection would be more defensive against accidental future schema changes.

success_rate.backend: 100% (20/20 unit + 5/5 live = 25/25 active; 1 skipped due to no city-page seed data)
success_rate.frontend: verified by code inspection only (GSC dependency)

seed_data_creation: None on live DB. Settings round-trip explicitly restored auto_local_seed_enabled=false at end of test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live API state restored: auto_local_seed_enabled=false, auto_promote_enabled=false. Live Playwright UI testing for stealth-ap-block requires GSC to be connected on preview env — currently NOT connected, so the inner ap-block (and our new local-block) only renders behind `report && r.gsc_connected && !r.reason`. To E2E test the toggle UI, mock GSC or run on a env where GSC is hooked up. Code inspection confirms `[data-testid=stealth-ap-local-block]` is correctly conditional on `digest.auto_promote_enabled`, contains `[data-testid=stealth-ap-local-seed]` checkbox, and history rows surface a green 'local' badge for `rec.scope==='city_page'`.

verification_details.backend_unit_pytest: 20/20 PASS in test_stealth_seo_local_seed.py: matcher (single-token, multi-word, intent-match, no-match, tile-shop fallback), pick_local (happy, already-seeded skip, 2× threshold, one-per-page, unpublished-status skip), apply (writes+records with scope=city_page), undo via shared token (city/collection scope dispatch), run_once (disabled, needs-AP-enabled, happy, batch-mode cap), settings flag, cron budget-sharing.
verification_details.backend_live_pytest: 5/5 PASS, 1 skipped: GET /digest/settings returns auto_local_seed_enabled (bool); PUT round-trip persists+restores; GET /auto-promote/history rows have token redacted (token_hint only); admin /undo/UNKNOWN_id → 404; public /undo/{badtoken} → 404. Public city-page test skipped because no live page currently has hidden_seo_keywords set (expected — auto_local_seed disabled).
verification_details.city_page_field_check: curl GET /api/shop/city-page/porcelain-tiles-maidstone returns row WITHOUT hidden_seo_keywords key because field isn't set on that doc. The route uses `find_one(..., {'_id': 0})` so when the field IS set, it surfaces naturally. SSR enrich (server-seo-enrich.js::buildCityPageMeta) reads `row.hidden_seo_keywords` defensively so missing field is safe.
verification_details.frontend_code_inspection: StealthPerformanceCard.jsx: toggleLocalSeed (lines 174-190) PUTs auto_local_seed_enabled with correct toast copy. UI block stealth-ap-local-block (lines 754-781) renders below batch-block, conditional on digest.auto_promote_enabled. Contains stealth-ap-local-seed checkbox bound to auto_local_seed_enabled. Explainer text appears only when checked (lines 773-779). History rows (lines 789-832) emit green 'local' badge + town-name text when rec.scope==='city_page'.
verification_details.frontend_live_playwright: BLOCKED: GSC not connected on preview env → ap-block parent (gated by `report && r.gsc_connected && !r.reason`) does not render → local-block can't be reached. NOT a regression; same gate exists in iter166-169. Recommend mocked-GSC harness for E2E coverage.
